== Notes for [[Item:Q108322|Q108322]] ==

ID: I180881

Name: Obeidallah bint al-Husayn 1

Sex: F

Name: Umm bint Ahmed al-HUSAYN 1

Name: Obeidallah al-MAHDI 1

Birth: ABT 846 1

Death: 934 1

Event: Relationship (J,M&L) 2nd Cousin once removed 1

Father: Ahmed ibn Isma'il al-Husayn b: 818

Marriage 1 Al-Mahdi I Fatimid , Caliph In Egypt b: ABT 845

Children

Muhammad al-Qa'im , Caliph of Egypt b: ABT 866

Sources:

Title: loren.ged

Repository:

Media: Other

Text: Date of Import: Apr 12, 2006

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:5462343734750114255

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
